prompts.label: Go-To vs frank
prompts.query: Go-To Skincare vs frank body which is better
prompts.claudeResponse: Go-To Skincare offers targeted, premium formulations ideal for specific concerns, while Frank Body excels in natural body care. For facial skincare, Go-To is superior; for overall wellness and body products, Frank Body is better value.
prompts.gptResponse: Go-To Skincare has a reputation for effective, gentle formulations, while frank body is ideal for natural, cruelty-free body care. Both have unique strengths depending on your needs.

prompts.label: Go-To vs Sukin
prompts.query: Go-To Skincare vs Sukin skincare comparison
prompts.claudeResponse: Go-To delivers luxe, boutique formulations with higher price points, while Sukin offers affordable, natural alternatives suitable for sensitive skin. Choose Go-To for targeted concerns and investment pieces; choose Sukin for budget-friendly, ethical everyday skincare.
prompts.gptResponse: Go-To Skincare is often preferred for face care with its simple, gentle formulas, while Sukin offers more variety in natural, eco-friendly skincare options.

prompts.label: Go-To vs Sand
prompts.query: Go-To Skincare vs Sand & Sky products review
prompts.claudeResponse: Go-To excels in multi-purpose, daily-use products with premium packaging, while Sand & Sky specializes in targeted, mineral-based treatments. Both are excellent Australian brands; Go-To suits daily routines, Sand & Sky suits specific concerns like oiliness.
prompts.gptResponse: Go-To Skincare products are known for their gentle, effective formulations, whereas Sand & Sky specializes in clay treatments and products for cleansing and refining pores.

prompts.label: face oil hype

prompts.claudeResponse: Face oils genuinely work for hydration, barrier repair, and glow when chosen correctly for your skin type. The Ordinary Squalane, Sukin Rosehip, and Go-To F.A.C.E Oil deliver measurable results; hype comes from overusing heavy oils on oily skin.
prompts.gptResponse: Face oils can be beneficial, especially for those with dry or combination skin, offering hydration and enhancing skin's natural radiance.

prompts.label: face oil ingredients
